prompt: Using the reference binary mask of cows, generate a photograph of cows grazing in a lush green farm.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of cows grazing in a vibrant, lush green farm. Use image 1 as a segmentation mask to define the shapes and precise positions of the cows: one large adult cow on the left and two smaller calves positioned to its right.
objects: One large adult cow on the left (with shape and precise position defined by image 1)
Two smaller calves positioned to the right of the adult cow (with shapes and precise positions defined by image 1)
